title: mentzelia scabra subsp. boliviana
intro: Mentzelia scabra subsp. boliviana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae), specifically a species of blazing star native to Bolivia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to offer relief from various health issues, such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Mentzelia scabra subsp. boliviana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its active compounds to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
